Over-Ear Headphones.title: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Industry Leading Noise Canceling Headphones with Auto Noise Canceling Optimizer, Crystal Clear Hands-Free Calling, and Alexa Voice Control, Black
bullets: INDUSTRY LEADING NOISE CANCELLATION-Two processors control 8 microphones for unprecedented noise cancellation. With Auto NC Optimizer, noise canceling is automatically optimized based on your wearing conditions and environment
MAGNIFICENT SOUND, ENGINEERED TO PERFECTION-Newly developed Integrated Processor V1 unleashes the potential of new 30mm driver units to deliver high-quality sound with reduced distortion
CRYSTAL CLEAR HANDS-FREE CALLING with 4 beamforming microphones, precise voice pickup, and advanced audio signal processing
Up to 30-Hour battery life with quick charging (3 min charge for 3 hours of playback)
ULTRA-COMFORTABLE LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN with soft fit leather and pressure-relieving design for hours of comfortable wear
Over-Ear Headphones.description: The WH-1000XM5 headphones rewrite the rules for distraction-free listening, with two processors controlling eight microphones for unprecedented noise canceling performance. With Auto NC Optimizer, noise canceling is automatically optimized based on your wearing conditions and environment.

Over-Ear Headphones.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra Wireless Noise Cancelling Headphones with Spatial Audio, Over-the-Ear Headphones with Mic, Up to 24 Hours of Battery Life, Black
bullets: BREAKTHROUGH SPATIAL AUDIO: Bose Immersive Audio uses new spatializing technologies to create an unmatched depth and dimension to all your favorite content
WORLD-CLASS NOISE CANCELLATION: Bose's CustomTune sound calibration system tailors noise cancellation and audio performance to the unique shape of your ears
PREMIUM COMFORT MEETS PREMIUM SOUND: Plush cushions and a lightweight design made from luxe materials offer hours of all-day listening comfort
CONTROL HOW YOU LISTEN: Choose between three listening modes - Quiet, Aware with ActiveSense, and Immersion
ALL-DAY BATTERY LIFE: Enjoy up to 24 hours of battery life using any listening mode - plus 4 hours of battery life on a quick 15 minute charge
Over-Ear Headphones.description: Bose QuietComfort Ultra Headphones rewrite the rulebook with breakthrough Bose Immersive Audio, world-class noise cancellation, and premium comfort engineered for all-day wear.

Over-Ear Headphones.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 Wireless Headphones - Bluetooth Headset for Crystal-Clear Calls with Adaptive Noise Cancellation, 60h Battery Life, Lightweight Folding Design, Black
bullets: EXCEPTIONAL SOUND PERFORMANCE - 42 mm transducer system tuned for clear, balanced sound with deep dynamic bass, smooth natural mids, and detailed treble
ADAPTIVE NOISE CANCELLATION - Senses your surroundings and adjusts dynamically to keep distractions out
60-HOUR BATTERY LIFE - All-day listening with one of the longest battery lives on the market; USB-C fast charging
CRYSTAL-CLEAR CALLS - Advanced 4-microphone beamforming technology with adaptive noise suppression for clear voice pickup
PERSONALIZED LISTENING - Sound Personalization, equalizer, and Sound Modes via the Sennheiser Smart Control App
Over-Ear Headphones.description: Momentum 4 Wireless brings together a refined design with class-leading audio for an immersive listening experience that lasts. 60 hours of battery and adaptive noise cancellation keep you in the moment.

True Wireless Earbuds.title: Apple AirPods Pro 2 Wireless Earbuds, Active Noise Cancellation, Hi-Fi Sound, Transparency Mode, Spatial Audio, MagSafe Charging Case (USB-C), Bluetooth Headphones for iPhone
bullets: RICHER AUDIO EXPERIENCE - The Apple-designed H2 chip pushes advanced audio performance even further
NEXT-LEVEL ACTIVE NOISE CANCELLATION - Up to 2x more Active Noise Cancellation than the previous generation
ADAPTIVE TRANSPARENCY - Lets outside sounds in while reducing the intensity of loud environmental noise
PERSONALIZED SPATIAL AUDIO with dynamic head tracking places sound all around you for an immersive listening experience
UP TO 6 HOURS of listening time with one charge with Active Noise Cancellation enabled; 30 hours total with MagSafe Charging Case
True Wireless Earbuds.description: AirPods Pro feature up to 2x more Active Noise Cancellation than the previous generation, Adaptive Transparency to let outside sounds in, and Personalized Spatial Audio with dynamic head tracking.

True Wireless Earbuds.title: Sony WF-1000XM5 The Best Truly Wireless Bluetooth Noise Canceling Earbuds Headphones with Alexa Built-in, Black
bullets: INDUSTRY LEADING NOISE CANCELLATION with two processors controlling six microphones for unprecedented noise canceling
MAGNIFICENT SOUND with the newly developed Dynamic Driver X for high-quality sound with reduced distortion
CRYSTAL CLEAR HANDS-FREE CALLING with bone conduction sensor and AI-based noise reduction algorithm
Up to 24-HOUR battery life with carrying case and quick charging (3 min charge for 1 hour of playback)
PREMIUM COMFORT WITH SECURE FIT with newly developed noise isolation earbud tips in multiple sizes (SS/S/M/L)
True Wireless Earbuds.description: Listen without limits with the WF-1000XM5. Industry-leading noise cancellation, magnificent sound, crystal clear hands-free calling, and a secure, comfortable fit.

True Wireless Earbuds.title: Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II, Wireless, Bluetooth, World's Best Noise Cancelling In-Ear Headphones with Personalized Noise Cancellation & Sound, Triple Black
bullets: PERSONALIZED NOISE CANCELLATION & SOUND: A breakthrough technology automatically personalizes the performance to the unique shape of your ears
WORLD'S BEST NOISE CANCELLATION: Hush the world around you to focus on what matters most - your music, podcasts, or moments of quiet
ULTIMATE COMFORT: Combines the most stable and comfortable in-ear fit ever, with all-day comfort for hours of listening
SECURE FIT: Newly designed stability bands and ear tips, both in three sizes, ensure a perfect fit for every ear
ALL-DAY BATTERY: Up to 6 hours of listening on a single charge with the case providing an additional 18 hours
True Wireless Earbuds.description: The Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II have been engineered to be the world's best noise cancelling earbuds, with breakthrough technology that personalizes the sound and noise cancellation to your unique ear shape.

On-Ear Headphones.title: Beats Solo 4 - Wireless Bluetooth On-Ear Headphones, Apple & Android Compatible, Up to 50 Hours of Battery Life - Matte Black
bullets: Custom acoustic architecture for rich, immersive sound with class-leading detail
50-hour battery life with Fast Fuel charging (10-min charge for 5 hours of playback)
Personalized Spatial Audio with dynamic head tracking for Apple devices
Lossless Audio via USB-C wired connection for studio-quality listening
Built-in microphone for crystal-clear calls and voice assistants
On-Ear Headphones.description: Beats Solo 4 are wireless on-ear headphones rebuilt from the ground up with custom acoustic architecture, 50 hours of battery life, and Personalized Spatial Audio.

On-Ear Headphones.title: JBL Tune 770NC - Adaptive Noise Cancelling Wireless Over-Ear Headphones, Up to 70H Battery Life with Speed Charge, Lightweight, Comfortable and Foldable Design (Black)
bullets: ADAPTIVE NOISE CANCELLING with Smart Ambient automatically adjusts to your environment
70 hours of battery life with Speed Charge - 5 minutes of charging delivers 3 hours of playtime
JBL Pure Bass Sound delivers powerful, deep bass at any volume
Bluetooth 5.3 Multi-Point Connection to switch between two devices seamlessly
Lightweight, foldable design with cushioned ear cups for all-day comfort
On-Ear Headphones.description: The JBL Tune 770NC delivers JBL Pure Bass Sound with Adaptive Noise Cancelling and 70 hours of battery life in a lightweight foldable design.

On-Ear Headphones.title: Skullcandy Hesh Evo Wireless Over-Ear Headphone - True Black
bullets: 36 hours of battery life with rapid charge (10-min charge for 3 hours of use)
Built-in Tile finder technology - locate your headphones with the Tile app
Bluetooth 5.0 wireless connection with up to 30 ft range
Custom-tuned 40mm drivers deliver Skullcandy's Supreme Sound signature
Activate your phone's voice assistant with a tap
On-Ear Headphones.description: Hesh Evo wireless over-ear headphones bring 36 hours of battery life, Tile-enabled find-my-headphones technology, and Skullcandy's signature Supreme Sound.

Kids Headphones.title: JLab JBuddies Studio Kids Wired Headphones, Toddler Headphones, Kid Safe Volume Limiter, Folding Adjustable Headphones, Noise Isolation with Mic and Limited 85dB Volume Output (Blue)
bullets: KID SAFE 85dB VOLUME LIMITER protects developing ears while still providing clear, loud audio
PERFECT FIT for ages 2-12 with fully adjustable headband and rotating ear cups that fold for portable use
DURABLE METAL & PLASTIC construction stands up to drops, tugs, and everyday wear
TANGLE FREE FABRIC CORD with built-in microphone for clear hands-free calls and video chats
SHARE THE MUSIC with included Music Share port - plug a second pair in for two listeners
Kids Headphones.description: JBuddies Studio are designed specifically for kids ages 2-12 with safety, comfort, and durability in mind. Volume-limited to 85dB, foldable, and built to survive everyday kid wear.

Kids Headphones.title: BuddyPhones Cosmos Plus, Active Noise Cancelling Bluetooth Kids Wireless Headphones, Best for Online Studying & Travel, with Safe Volume Limit of 75, 85, 94dB and Travel Bag
bullets: ACTIVE NOISE CANCELLING blocks up to 22dB of ambient noise for distraction-free study and travel
3 SAFE VOLUME LIMITERS - 75dB for travel, 85dB for everyday, 94dB for noisy environments
24-HOUR PLAYTIME with USB-C charging - perfect for long flights and road trips
ADJUSTABLE & FOLDABLE design fits ages 5-15; soft padding for all-day comfort
INCLUDES TRAVEL BAG, audio cable, charging cable, and StudyBuddy mic for online learning
Kids Headphones.description: BuddyPhones Cosmos Plus are the world's first active noise cancelling headphones designed specifically for children, with three safe volume limits and 24 hours of battery life.

Kids Headphones.title: LilGadgets Connect Plus Pro Kids Premium Wired Headphones with Microphone, SharePort, and Volume Limiting (Black)
bullets: Volume limited to 93dB to protect children's hearing during use
SharePort allows multiple kids to listen to the same audio source
In-line microphone for hands-free calling and online learning
Soft, plush ear cushions covered in premium materials for all-day comfort
Designed for ages 4 and up with adjustable headband and tangle-free cord
Kids Headphones.description: LilGadgets Connect Plus Pro Kids Wired Headphones combine kid-safe volume limiting, all-day comfort, and a SharePort for shared listening - ideal for online learning and family travel.
